q.en: Why was there a substitute teacher in Mrs. Martinez's class that day?
q.zh: 那天马丁内斯女士的班上为什么来了代课老师？

options.en: The class was on a field trip according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 全班去校外教学了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Mrs. Martinez had not arrived by 8:05
options.zh: 到8点05分马丁内斯女士还没到

explain.en: The book says: 'It was 8:05, and Mrs. Martinez still wasn't there, which could only mean one thing: a substitute teacher.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'当时是8点05分，马丁内斯女士还没到，这意味着一件事：代课老师要来了。'

q.en: What was strange about Pirate Chalk Beard's hand?
q.zh: 海盗粉笔胡子先生的手有什么奇怪之处？

options.en: He had a wooden hand according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他有一只木手（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He had a piece of chalk in place of a hand
options.zh: 他有一截粉笔代替了手

explain.en: The book says: 'He pulled back his sleeve, revealing a piece of chalk in place of a hand.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'他拉起袖子，露出一只由粉笔代替的手。'

q.en: What did the students dig up at the swings?
q.zh: 学生们在秋千处挖出了什么？

options.en: A pile of gold coins according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一堆金币（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A wooden chest full of pirate costumes
options.zh: 一个装满海盗服装的木箱

explain.en: The book says: 'They helped Chalk Beard lug out an enormous wooden chest. The lid opened with a creak—inside were pirate costumes.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'他们帮粉笔胡子先生拖出一个巨大的木箱。箱盖嘎吱打开——里面是海盗服装。'

q.en: In which class did Pirate Chalk Beard read from the book Treasure Island?
q.zh: 海盗粉笔胡子先生在哪门课上朗读了《金银岛》？

options.en: Geography according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 地理课（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'In Literature, he read to them from Treasure Island.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：'在文学课上，他给他们朗读《金银岛》。'

q.en: In the story, what does the word 'landlubber' mean?
q.zh: 在故事中，'landlubber'（陆地懒汉）是什么意思？

options.en: A person who lives on land, not the sea
options.zh: 住在陆地上而非海上的人

options.en: A teacher according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一名老师（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Pirate Chalk Beard explains: 'A landlubber is a land lover. Someone who lives on land and not the sea.'
explain.zh: 粉笔胡子先生解释道：'陆地懒汉是爱陆地的人，即住在陆地上而非海上的人。'

q.en: How did Jack feel at the start of the story?
q.zh: 故事开始时杰克的感受如何？

options.en: Excited and bouncing according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 兴奋且蹦跳（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Shy and quiet; he didn't talk much

explain.en: The book says Jack sat alone in the back and 'He's shy,' Juan said. 'He doesn't talk much.'
explain.zh: 书中说杰克独自坐在后排，'他很害羞，'胡安说，'他不太说话。'

q.en: What lesson does Pirate Chalk Beard teach Jack at the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事结尾，海盗粉笔胡子先生教给杰克什么道理？

options.en: It isn't the size of your voice that matters, but the size of your heart
options.zh: 重要的不是嗓门大小，而是心胸的大小

options.en: Only tall people can be pirates
options.zh: 只有高个子才能当海盗

options.en: You should always speak as loudly as possible according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 你应该尽可能大声说话（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Chalk Beard tells Jack: 'Remember, matey, it isn't the size of your voice that be matterin'. It's the size of your heart.'
explain.zh: 粉笔胡子先生对杰克说：'记住，伙伴，重要的不是你嗓门的大小，而是你心胸的大小。'

q.en: Why did Chalk Beard give Jack his pirate hat?
q.zh: 粉笔胡子先生为什么把海盗帽给了杰克？

options.en: Because Jack got no costume and Chalk Beard had been a shy pirate too
options.zh: 因为杰克没拿到服装，而粉笔胡子也曾是个害羞的海盗

options.en: Because Jack dug the fastest according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 因为杰克挖得最快（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: When the chest was empty for Jack, 'Chalk Beard winked, took off his hat, and set it on Jack's head. "I was once a shy pirate myself, y'know."'
explain.zh: 当宝箱里杰克什么也没拿到时，'粉笔胡子先生眨眨眼，摘下帽子戴在杰克头上。"我自己也曾是个害羞的海盗，你知道的。"'

q.en: What special day is it when the pirate substitute visits the class?
q.zh: 海盗代课老师来访时是什么特别的日子？

options.en: Substitute Teacher Day according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 代课老师日（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The pirate says: 'No one's shy on Talk like a Pirate Day.'
explain.zh: 海盗说：'在像海盗一样说话日，没有人是害羞的。'

q.en: What joke does Jack tell about why pirates take so long to learn the alphabet?
q.zh: 杰克讲了一个关于海盗为什么学字母表要花很久的笑话，是什么？

options.en: They spend years at the letter C
options.zh: 他们在字母C上要花好多年

options.en: They start with the letter Z according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们从字母Z开始（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Jack says: 'I know why it takes pirates so long to learn the alphabet. Because they spend years at C.'
explain.zh: 杰克说：'我知道海盗为什么学字母表要花那么久。因为他们在字母C上要花好多年。'

prompt.en: If you were a student in Mrs. Martinez's class that day, what would you have done during Pirate Chalk Beard's visit? Write a short paragraph.
prompt.zh: 如果你是那天马丁内斯女士班上的学生，在粉笔胡子海盗先生来访时你会做什么？写一小段话。

en: Say which activity you would have enjoyed most (science, literature, P.E., or geography)
Connect it to the pirate theme of the day
zh: 说出你最喜欢哪项活动（科学、文学、体育或地理）
将其与当天的海盗主题联系起来
